qa_pairs.question: How do tenants affect bucket name collisions in the new Arbutus Cloud Object Storage?
qa_pairs.answer: In the new Arbutus Cloud Object Storage, bucket name collisions will only happen within an individual project (tenant), instead of across all projects in Arbutus.

qa_pairs.question: For public access to buckets in the new Arbutus Cloud Object Storage without authentication, what information must be specified, and what is the Tenant ID equivalent to?
qa_pairs.answer: For public access to buckets with no authentication, the tenant must be specified. The Tenant ID is identical to the OpenStack Project ID.

qa_pairs.question: What is the URL format for unauthenticated S3 access to objects in the new Arbutus Cloud Object Storage?
qa_pairs.answer: The URL for unauthenticated S3 access will be of the following format: `https://object-arbutus.alliancecan.ca/<tenant-id>:<bucket-name>/<object-name>`.
